title: Get to Know Sandy Hussain, Juneau SBDC Director & Business Growth Expert
summary: It’s been a big year for the Alaska SBDC in Juneau, and much of that momentum is thanks to Sandy Hussain, the Center’s Director and a seasoned entrepreneur bringing fresh perspective and powerful experience to Southeast Alaska’s business community. In her first year at the helm, Sandy has helped dozens of clients navigate the challenges of starting and growing a business, supported over 180 local jobs, and guided entrepreneurs in securing more than $2.6 million in funding. From first-time founders to established...

title: New podcast explores Rick Thoman’s life and career
summary: The University of Alaska Fairbanks launched a new podcast this week exploring the life and career of Rick Thoman, from tracking the weather on his bedroom wall as a child to becoming Alaska’s trusted source of climate information. “I’ve been interested in weather and climate from my earliest memories,” said Thoman, a climate s...

title: AST Assault 3: Fairbanks [AK25045891]
summary: On 5/14/2025, Troopers responded to the area of Sandvik Street in Fairbanks for a report of a male who had pointed a handgun at a female. An investigation was conducted, and Robert McNeil was ultimately arrested for Assault in the Third Degree. He was remanded to the Fairbanks Correctional Center.
